text: The first space wraps me in silence and structure, its emptiness both calming and unsettling—a blank canvas of possibility where time seems to slow down. In the second, I am drawn into vibrant inquiry; the wall of research and innovation feels charged with potential, promising progress and ideas yet to be realized. Moving from bare openness into a world of ideas, I feel myself carried between anticipation and curiosity, pondering how our environments shape the mind's restless quest for meaning.
